symptom: a swallowed handful of metal after a bet and now a strange dragging weight low in the chest
hook: a full set of keys on a ring was sitting inside the stomach
whatYouSee: A set of keys on a ring is sitting inside the stomach with the separate keys clearly outlined.
whyItMatters: The jagged edges can catch on the gut wall and the ring can snag which stops the whole cluster from passing on its own.
treatment: The whole bunch is removed with an endoscope guided down into the stomach.
takeaway: Not everything that goes down is meant to come back the same way.
igOptions: A. A swallowed set of keys

laypersonQuestion: What would make someone swallow this on a bet?
seedHint: Look at the shape in the stomach and count how many pieces you can spot.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a swallowed handful of metal after a bet and now a strange dragging weight low in the chest.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a full set of keys on a ring was sitting inside the stomach.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed keys

👀 What you see:
A set of keys on a ring is sitting inside the stomach with the separate keys clearly outlined.

🦴 Why it matters:
The jagged edges can catch on the gut wall and the ring can snag which stops the whole cluster from passing on its own.

💊 Treatment:

The whole bunch is removed with an endoscope guided down into the stomach.
